exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your personal growth forward
items: Complete a comprehensive self-assessment using a validated personality test (like the Big Five or StrengthsFinder)
Create a personal values inventory by identifying and ranking your top 10 core values
Document your life story timeline highlighting 10 pivotal moments that shaped who you are today
Conduct a skills and knowledge audit by listing your current abilities and identifying 3 key gaps to address
Interview 5 people who know you well to gather feedback on your strengths, blind spots, and growth areas
Create a comprehensive personal mission statement by writing and refining a 2-3 sentence declaration of your life purpose
